meaning: n.[语]达里语(现代波斯语的一种,主要为塔吉克人使用)
examples: I speak some Dari, the language spoken by the Tajiks, but very little.
Her favorite class was Dari, the local language, before she was made to drop out of school.
Last month Mr Mohseni launched a satellite news channel broadcasting round the clock in Dari and Pashto.
Neither their language nor their way of life is widely understood in the Dari-speaking north.
Part of the LEAP programme, it features police-related issues in the national languages of Dari and Pashto.
